summary: Full end-to-end testing of MIR Consulting site. All 10 backend pytest tests passed (health, lead create, validation, admin auth, protected endpoints). All frontend critical flows verified via Playwright: navigation, hero, services/industries/insights/case-studies pages, contact form submission with success toast + form reset, admin login (wrong + correct), dashboard stats + leads table containing the freshly submitted lead, and logout. No critical bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py: `logger` is referenced inside `create_lead` (line 88) but is defined later in the module (line 126). It works at runtime because the module finishes loading before any request, but it is a code-smell. Move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` and `logging.basicConfig(...)` to the top of the file (after imports) for clarity.

backend/server.py: ADMIN_TOKEN falls back to `secrets.token_urlsafe(32)` if env var missing. That makes tokens ephemeral across restarts and could break sessions. Consider failing fast if ADMIN_TOKEN is not set in production.
frontend/src/lib/api.js: no global response interceptor for 401 -> auto-logout. Admin.jsx handles it locally but a global interceptor would be more robust.
Contact.jsx error toast on validation could use a single combined check; current logic is acceptable.
No backend rate-limiting on /api/leads or /api/admin/login (brute-force risk). Acceptable for MVP, worth noting for production.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest created one lead (TEST Jane Doe / test_jane@example.com). Frontend UI test created a unique lead (test_ui_<ts>@example.com). Both visible in admin dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_mir_api.py covers all 10 review items. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_mir_api.py -v. Frontend uses data-testid for: hero-headline, nav-link-{about,services,industries,insights,case-studies,contact}, navbar-cta-book, contact-input-{name,email,company,phone,message}, contact-select-{industry,service}, contact-submit-button, admin-password-input, admin-login-submit, admin-stat-total, admin-stat-new, admin-leads-table, admin-logout-button, admin-dashboard-page, admin-login-page. Toasts use sonner: query '[data-sonner-toast]'. Wait at least 2-3s after submit for toast rendering and form reset.
